caption.full:
Star Wars Icons: Vader book set for 2026 release with two editions

A nearly 500-page nonfiction book exploring Darth Vader's legacy will be released on October 20, 2026. Authored by Anthony Breznican, it features interviews with Steven Spielberg and Lawrence Kasdan, alongside behind-the-scenes photos and concept art.

Is a $450 deep‑dive into Vader’s legacy worth the price for your collection?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#StarWars #DarthVader #MovieNews #BookRelease
caption.firstComment: I’m curious—do you think the insights from Spielberg and Kasdan plus the exclusive art justify the $450 price tag?

facebook.text: A new nearly 500-page book, "Star Wars Icons: Vader," is coming October 20, 2026. Authored by Anthony Breznican with a foreword by Hayden Christensen, it features interviews with Steven Spielberg and Lawrence Kasdan. The book collects behind-the-scenes photos, concept art, and memorabilia. What are your favorite Darth Vader moments? Let us know below!

youtube.title: Anthony Breznican's Vader Book: $450 Limited Edition
youtube.description:
Anthony Breznican's "Star Wars Icons: Vader" arrives October 20, 2026, featuring interviews with Steven Spielberg and Lawrence Kasdan. The nearly 500-page book includes behind-the-scenes photos and concept art, with a limited edition priced at $450.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
